author: Lorenzo Strambi
description: Sends Telegram notifications when your tasks reach their deadline. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Lorenzo Strambi
manifest.description: Sends Telegram notifications when your tasks reach their deadline. Features customizable message templates and Markdown formatting.
manifest.name: Reminder Telegram

name: Reminder Telegram

releases.author: Lukather
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Main change
* feat(sidebar): reactive task dashboard with urgency grouping and filters by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/49
---
* Bump version to 1.0.6 and rename style.css to styles.css by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/40
* Merge pull request #40 from Lukather/main by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/41
* Bump version to 1.0.6 and rename style.css to styles.css by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/42
* Bump @types/node from 25.7.0 to 25.9.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/33
* Bump actions/checkout from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/32
* Bump actions/setup-node from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/31
* Update CodeQL workflow security-events permission by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/43
* Upgrade actions/setup-node, actions/checkout, and @types/node by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/44
* Add CODEOWNERS file for report assignment by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/45
* Upgrade dependencies and implement reliability improvements by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/46
* refactor: streamlined task scanning and deadline checking after plan … by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/47
* docs: update README with sidebar feature and move PRD to docs by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/50
* Bump typescript-eslint from 8.35.1 to 8.60.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/51
* Enhance CI workflow with version bump and attestation by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/53
* Update git push command to specify branch by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/54
* Refactor lint workflow to remove version update steps by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/55


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/compare/1.0.6...1.0.7

releases.author: Lukather
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Enhance workflows with dev branch and update Node.js versions by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/26
* Add max tasks per check and enhance Telegram templates by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/27
* Update AGENTS.md to reflect current plugin state by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/29
* Add upcoming task reminders with settings and deduplicated notify queue. by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/35
* Bump actions/upload-artifact from 4.6.1 to 7.0.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/30
* Enhance UX with multi-task digest, variable chips, and Markdown examples by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/36
* Bump version to 1.0.4 by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/37
* Merge pull request #37 from Lukather/dev by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/38
* Bump version to 1.0.5 by @Lukather in https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/pull/39


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Lukather/obsidian-reminder-telegram/compare/1.0.3...1.0.5

releases.author: Lukather
releases.description:
**What's New in Version 1.0.1**

New Features:

1.  Customizable Message Templates - Personalize Telegram notification content
2.  Template Variables - Dynamic content with {count}, {taskName}, {deadline}, etc.
3.  Markdown Formatting - Rich text formatting support for Telegram messages
4.  Smart Notification Selection - Individual templates for single tasks, bulk for multiple

Bug Fixes:

- Fixed issue where individual templates weren't being used for single tasks
- Improved template rendering with proper error handling

releases.author: Lukather
releases.description: Release 1.0.0 ready to be download and installed on Obsidian
